_doc: Per-industry applicability map for scoring categories. Built for PR-2 of the pre-launch scoring-flags rollout (Jun 2026). Keys = every distinct `cat` value across public/data/companies/*.json (34 values per scoring-engine-audit §4). Values: `na` lists scoring categories that are NOT APPLICABLE for that industry (renders 'Not Applicable for this Industry' in PR-3, excluded from grade math). Unlisted categories are implicitly applicable. The reflag script (scripts/reflag-categories.mjs) consumes this map. SAFE DEFAULT: when in doubt, leave a category applicable — a false-positive `na` is worse UX than a low-confidence score.

_rules.guns: NA for every industry except retailers who actually sell firearms (Retail, Outdoor, Sports & Fitness) and firearms makers (Defense & Aerospace, Aerospace).
_rules.health: Applicable only to industries that sell physical products humans eat / put on bodies / use medically: Food & Beverage, Beverage, Grocery, Healthcare, Beauty & Personal Care, Pet Care, Consumer Goods (partial — leave applicable), Retail (partial — leave applicable since they sell food).
_rules.animals: NA for non-physical-product industries: Financial Services, Professional Services, Technology, Telecommunications, Entertainment & Media, Education, Hospitality, Hospitality & Travel, Travel, Airline, Transportation, Utilities, Utility.
_rules.execPay: Handled by reflag script at per-company level, not industry — driven by ticker/isPublic presence.
_rules.dei: Handled per-company by reflag script — driven by deiBadges presence and sec-def14a-augment.
_rules.charity: Handled per-company by reflag script — driven by corporate-giving-augment.json membership.
_rules.transparency: Handled per-company by reflag script — driven by transparency-benchmarks-augment.json or wikirate-augment.json membership.
_rules.environment_inferred: Handled per-company by reflag script — when narrative is 'No public record found' AND industry-carbon-intensity-augment.json has a sector for the company's cat, mark environment as {_inferred:true, basis:<cat>}.
